description: Queries the M-26-14 data retirement audit index (m2614-retirement-requests) using ES|QL. Use this tool to find indices pending retirement, legal hold status, gate approval states, and audit trail for deletion decisions. Useful for POA&M drafting to surface open retirement compliance gaps.

configuration.query: FROM m2614-retirement-requests | WHERE state == ?state | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT ?limit

state.description: Retirement state to filter on. Valid values: pending_gate1, approved_gate1, pending_gate2, approved_gate2, scheduled_for_deletion, legal_hold_initiated. Use * or omit to see all states.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return. Default: 20. Use 100 for full audit sweep.
